commands_run: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/hex.fk form-stdlib/auth-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/auth-port-band.fk
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py
failure_reason: Added a Form-native auth parity carrier for mutable routes. auth-port.fk reads X-API-Key from kh-request/kh-header values case-insensitively, allows the configured shared API key, allows active contributor keys by sha256 raw-key hex hash, denies missing/wrong/blank keys with the FastAPI 401 detail, and denies production dev-key misconfiguration with the FastAPI 500 detail. Public mutable front-door routes intentionally remain FastAPI until direct application graph_nodes Postgres writes, revision rows, and edge cleanup are native.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/hex.fk form-stdlib/auth-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/auth-port-band.fk
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py
